name: find-skills
description: Discover and search for AI agent skills from the open skills ecosystem. Helps locate and identify relevant skills for your workflow.
author: vercel-labs
content:
# Find Skills

A skill for discovering and searching through the open agent skills ecosystem. Use this skill when you need to find other skills that might help with your task.

## Features
- Search skills by name and description
- Filter skills by category and author
- View installation instructions
- Sort by popularity and installation count

## Usage
Use this skill to help agents discover and locate other available skills from the skills ecosystem.

name: vercel-react-best-practices
description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Comprehensive guide for optimizing React applications and Next.js pages.
author: vercel-labs
content:
# React Best Practices

Comprehensive performance optimization guide for React and Next.js applications with 57 prioritized rules organized by severity and impact.

## Rule Categories
- Eliminating Waterfalls (CRITICAL)
- Bundle Size Optimization (CRITICAL)
- Server-Side Performance (HIGH)
- Client-Side Data Fetching (MEDIUM-HIGH)
- Re-render Optimization (MEDIUM)
- Rendering Performance (MEDIUM)
- JavaScript Performance (LOW-MEDIUM)
- Advanced Patterns (LOW)

## Use Cases
Apply when writing new React components, implementing data fetching, reviewing code for performance issues, refactoring existing code, or optimizing bundle size and load times.

description: Browser automation and web interaction capabilities for AI agents to control and interact with web applications.
author: vercel-labs
content:
# Agent Browser

Enable AI agents to automate browser interactions and control web applications programmatically.

## Capabilities
- Navigate to URLs
- Click elements
- Fill forms
- Extract page content
- Execute JavaScript
- Wait for elements
- Take screenshots
- Handle multiple tabs

## Use Cases
- Web scraping
- Automated testing
- Form filling
- Data extraction
- Web application automation

## Security
Always validate URLs and user inputs. Use sandboxed browser contexts when available.

name: skill-creator
description: Tools and guidelines for creating new AI agent skills following the Agent Skills specification and standards.
author: anthropics
content:
# Skill Creator

Create new Agent Skills following the official Agent Skills specification (SKILL.md format).

## Skill Structure
- SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter
- Optional scripts/ directory for executable code
- Optional references/ directory for detailed docs
- Optional assets/ directory for templates and data

## Metadata Fields
- name: Skill identifier (lowercase, hyphens)
- description: What the skill does and when to use it
- license: Optional license specification
- metadata: Optional key-value pairs

## Best Practices
- Keep SKILL.md under 500 lines
- Use progressive disclosure pattern
- Include step-by-step instructions
- Provide usage examples
- Handle edge cases gracefully

## Validation
Use skills-ref CLI to validate your skill structure and naming conventions.

name: test-driven-development
description: Test-driven development (TDD) methodology and practices for writing tests before implementation code.
author: obra
content:
# Test-Driven Development

Framework and best practices for test-driven development methodology.

## TDD Cycle
- Red phase: Write failing test
- Green phase: Write minimal code to pass
- Refactor phase: Improve code structure

## Benefits
- Higher code quality
- Better design
- Improved confidence
- Living documentation
- Easier maintenance

## Test Types in TDD
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- Acceptance tests
- Property-based tests

## Best Practices
- Test behavior, not implementation
- Keep tests simple and focused
- Use descriptive test names
- Avoid test dependencies
- Mock external dependencies
- Maintain test suite speed

## Challenges and Solutions
- Testing legacy code
- Async testing patterns
- Database testing
- UI testing with TDD
- Team adoption strategies
